name: llm-wiki-organizer
description: Codex skill bundle for the llm-wiki-memory stack.

interface.shortDescription: Retrieve, curate, and lint the llm-wiki memory stack.
interface.longDescription: Codex plugin scaffold for the llm-wiki-memory packet. It packages the llm-wiki-organizer skill plus prompt assets for vault-backed evidence retrieval, durable memory, and wiki maintenance.
defaultPrompt: Ingest a source into the wiki.
Query the wiki for supporting evidence.
Lint recent pages and flag conflicts.
